Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 3, 090 [Šumma Izbu 01][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

BE MUNUS a-rat-ma ša₃ ŠA₃-ša₃ ER₂ KUR NIG₂.GIG IGI[mar]

(o 1) If a woman is pregnant and her foetus keeps crying: the land will experience trouble.

o 22

BE MUNUS a-rat-ma ša₃ ŠA₃-ša₃ i-ḫa-az-za kur₃-ru₃ LA₂al E₂ LU₂ BIR[aḫ]

(o 2) If a woman is pregnant and her foetus keeps sighing: the GUR-unit will be weighed; the man's household will be scattered.

o 33

BE MUNUS a-rat-ma ša₃ ŠA₃-ša₃ i-dam-mu-um E₂ LU₂ E₂.GAL UŠde

(o 3) If a woman is pregnant and her foetus keeps moaning: the palace will appropriate the man's house.

o 44

BE MUNUS a-rat-ma ša₃ ŠA₃-ša₃ is-si-ma še-⸢mu⸣-[u₂] ⸢iš⸣-me₂ KUR₂ dan-nu ZI-ma KUR u₃-šal-pat

(o 4) If a woman is pregnant and her foetus keeps shouting and someone hears it: a strong enemy will attack and will plunder the land; annihilation of its [...]; the enemy will enjoy prosperity. Ditto (If a woman is pregnant and her foetus keeps shouting and someone hears it): the man's household will be scattered.

o 55

NIG₂.ḪA.⸢LAM⸣.[MA ...]-šu₂ SIG₅ KUR₂ GU₇ KI.MIN<(BE)> MUNUS a-rat-ma ša₃ ŠA₃-ša₃ is-si-ma še-⸢mu⸣-[u₂] ⸢iš⸣-me₂ E₂ LU₂ BIRaḫ

o 66

BE MUNUS UR.⸢MAḪ U₃.TU⸣ [...] ⸢DAB⸣bat LUGAL-BI LA₂mu

(o 6) If a woman gives birth to a lion: he will seize [...]; its king will be bound.

o 77

BE MUNUS UR.⸢BAR⸣.[RA] [U₃.TU ...] MANni

(o 7) If a woman [gives birth to] a wolf: [...] will change.

o 88

BE MUNUS UR.⸢GI₇⸣ [U₃.TU ...]-ma E₂-su BIRaḫ UMUŠ KUR MANni DINGIR GU₇

(o 8) If a woman [gives birth to] a dog and [...]: his household will be scattered; decisions for the land will change; the god will devour (the land)1.

o 99

BE ⸢MUNUS⸣ [U₃.TU ...] [AŠ].TE DABbat

(o 9) If a woman [gives birth to ...] will seize the throne.

o 1010

[...] ina KUR GAL₂ši

(o 10) [...] there will be [...] in the land.

o 1111

[...] MIN<(U₃.TU)> [...] LUGAL ŠU₂ ina KUR GAL₂-ma KUR ŠA₃.ḪUL IGImar

(o 11) [...] ditto (gives birth to) [...] there will be a king of the world in the land and the land will experience sorrow.

o 1212

[...] MIN<(U₃.TU)> [...] LUGAL GABA.RI NU TUKUši KI.MIN ⸢LUGAL⸣ [x] ina KUR GAL₂ši

(o 12) [...] ditto (gives birth to) [...] the king will not acquire an opponent. Ditto: there will be a king of [...] in the land.

o 1313

[...] MIN<(U₃.TU)> [...] KUR [...] ŠUBdi!

(o 13) [...] ditto (gives birth to) [...]: the land [...] will be abandoned.

o 1414

[...] MIN<(U₃.TU)> [...] ⸢LUGAL ŠU₂⸣ ina KUR GAL₂ši

(o 14) [...] ditto (gives birth to) [...]: there will be a king of the world in the land.

o 1515

[...] NUN GABA.RI [(x)] NU TUKUši

(o 15) [...] the prince will not acquire an opponent.

o 1616

[...] x x [...] ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(NUN)> GABA.RI NU TUKUši

(o 16) [...] ... [...] ditto (the prince will have no opponent).

o 1717

[...] MIN<(U₃.TU)> [...] AL.BIR

(o 17) [...] ditto (gives birth to) [...] will be scattered.

o 1818

[...] BAL.⸢GI⸣ku₆ MIN<(U₃.TU)> [...] BA₃ut ŠEŠ.UNUGki ša₂ me-ḫu-u₂ x ⸢ŠU?⸣ ḪI x

(o 18) [...] ditto (gives birth to) a raqqu-turtle [...] omen of Ur, that a storm wind will [...].

o 1919

⸢BE⸣ [MUNUS NIG₂].⸢BUN₂!⸣.NAku₆ MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ ⸢LU₂⸣ [(x)] AL.BIR

(o 19) If [a woman] ditto (gives birth to) a šeleppû-turtle: the man's household will be scattered.

o 2020

BE [MUNUS] ⸢NUNUZ⸣ [...] ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(E₂)> ⸢LU₂⸣ AL.BIR

(o 20) If [a woman] ditto (gives birth to) an egg: ditto (the man's household will be scattered).

o 2121

BE [MUNUS] NUNUZ MIN<(U₃.TU)> x ŠA₃.⸢ḪUL⸣ [...] ⸢KUR?⸣ BIR-ma ana KI-šu₂ NU GURar₂

(o 21) If [a woman] ditto (gives birth to) an egg: sorrow [...]; the land will be scattered and will not return to normal.

o 2222

BE ⸢MUNUS⸣ NUNUZ MIN<(U₃.TU-)>ma a-tam NAM.⸢LU₂.U₁₈?.LU?⸣ GAR [...] KI.MIN

(o 22) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) an egg but it is provided with a human hatchling: [...] ditto.

o 2323

BE MUNUS bi-nu-ut KU₆ MIN<(U₃.TU)> BAL LUGAL SI.SA₂ DINGIR-ME LUGALtu TILtu-u₂

(o 23) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) fish roe: the king's reign will thrive; the gods will bring kingship to an end.

o 2424

BE MUNUS MUŠEN MIN<(U₃.TU)> DINGIR IRI KI IRI ze-ni SIG₅ NU GAL₂-ma IRI EREN₂-šu₂ LUGAL IDIM-MEŠ-šu₂ KURad₂

(o 24) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a bird: the city's god will be angry with the city; there will be no good fortune and his troops will reach the city, his noblemen (will reach) the king.

o 2525

BE MUNUS DINGIR ša₂ bu-na TUKU MIN<(U₃.TU)> LUGAL ŠU₂ KUR i-bel! : UN-MEŠ-šu₂ <EN?>el

(o 25) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a god who has features: a king of the world will rule over the land (or): will rule over his people.

o 2626

BE MUNUS DINGIR ša₂ bu-na NU TUKU MIN<(U₃.TU)> BAL LUGAL TIL

(o 26) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a god who has no features: the king's reign will end.

o 2727

BE MUNUS ŠU.SI MIN<(U₃.TU)> DAM LU₂ DAM-su ana MUNUS.ḪUL UŠde

(o 27) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a finger: a man's wife will accompany his2 husband into misfortune.

o 2828

BE MUNUS UZU.NU GU₄ MIN<(U₃.TU)> IRI ina-qar LUGAL LA₂mu KUR BI ZAḪ₂

(o 28) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) the lipištu-substance of an ox: the city will be demolished; the king will be bound; that land will be destroyed.

o 2929

BE MUNUS i-pi₂ MIN<(U₃.TU)> KUR BI ŠUBdi

(o 29) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) an afterbirth: that land will be abandoned.

o 3030

BE MUNUS i-pi₂ ša₂ UZU UŠ₂ SA₅ MIN<(U₃.TU)> KUR BI ZAḪ₂

(o 30) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) an afterbirth whose flesh is full of blood: that land will be destroyed.

o 3131

BE MUNUS a-pi₂-sa₂-la-a MIN<(U₃.TU)> KUR BI ZAḪ₂

(o 31) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a cripple: that land will be destroyed.

o 3232

BE MUNUS UZU.NU MIN<(U₃.TU)> IRI BI ŠUBdi LUGAL TAB U₄ LA₂ EŠ

(o 32) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) lipištu-substance: that city will be abandoned; the king ....

o 3333

BE MUNUS 2 lu 3 lip-ša₂-tu₂ MIN<(U₃.TU)> KUR BI ZAḪ₂

(o 33) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) 2 or 3 lipištu-substances: that city will be destroyed.

o 3434

BE MUNUS UŠ₃še-li-tu₂ MIN<(U₃.TU)> BAL LUGAL MANni IRI BI NU SI.SA₂

(o 34) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) an afterbirth: the king's reign will change; that city will not thrive.

o 3535

BE MUNUS SAG.DU MIN<(U₃.TU)> KUR dan-[na-tu₄] DABbat

(o 35) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a head: distress will afflict the land.

o 3636

BE MUNUS qa₂-ti MIN<(U₃.TU)> LUGAL ŠU₂ ina KUR GAL₂⸢ši⸣

(o 36) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a hand: there will be a king of the world in the land.

o 3737

BE MUNUS ri-it-ti MIN<(U₃.TU)> x [x] ḫi₂-pi₂u₂-lu E₂ LU₂ BIRaḫ

(o 37) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a wrist: ... [...] (gloss: break) or the man's household will be scattered.

o 3838

BE MUNUS GIR₃ MIN<(U₃.TU)> qa₂-lal LU₂!(KUR)

(o 38) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a foot: despisal of the man.

o 3939

BE MUNUS u₂-šul-tu₂ ša₂ SIG₂ laḫ-mat MIN<(U₃.TU)> MUNUS BI BA.UŠ₂

(o 39) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a vein which is covered with hair: that woman will die.

o 4040

BE MUNUS 1 SI UD₅ BAL ⸢i⸣-ša-an-ni

(o 40) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) 1 goat's horn: the reign will change.

o 4141

BE MUNUS 2 SI UD₅ MIN<(U₃.TU)> [x x] UKU₂in E₂ BI AL.BIR

(o 41) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) 2 goat's horns: [...] he will become poor; that household will be scattered.

o 4242

BE MUNUS SI MAŠ.DA₃ MIN<(U₃.TU)> taq-ti-it BALe U₄-ME i-ṣu-tu

(o 42) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a gazelle's horn: end of the reign; few days.

o 4343

BE MUNUS IMṭi-du MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ LU₂ AL.BIR

(o 43) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) clay: the man's household will be scattered.

o 4444

BE MUNUS mu-qa₂-ru MIN<(U₃.TU)> ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(E₂)> LU₂ AL.BIR

(o 44) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a muqaru: ditto (the man's household will be scattered).

o 4545

BE MUNUS ma-li-i MIN<(U₃.TU)> LUGAL ana LUGAL GABA.RI-šu₂ ša₂ UR PA LU? BAL mit-gur-tu₂ ana x ana LUGAL

(o 45) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) matted hair: the king will ... to the king, his opponent who ...; reign of agreement; to ... to the king.

o 4646

BE MUNUS iz-ba-am MIN<(U₃.TU)> LUGAL KISLAḪ₃ DABbat

(o 46) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) an anomaly: distress will afflict the king.

o 4747

BE MUNUS iz-ba-am MIN<(U₃.TU-)>ma ina ŠA₃-šu₂ iz-bu MAN-ma GAR BAL LUGAL u DUMU-ME-šu₂ ⸢TIL⸣ KUR MA.DAM DUGUD u₂-maš-šar

(o 47) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) an anomaly and another anomaly is located inside it: the reign of the king and his sons will [...]; the land will relinquish precious luxuriance.

o 4848

BE MUNUS TU₁₅ša₂-ra MIN<(U₃.TU)> LUGAL KUR-su KUR₂-šu₂ na-an-še-e KUR-su [...] TI GAL₂ši BIR E₂ LU₂

(o 48) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) air: (as for) the king, his land will revolt against him; uprising of his land; there will be ...; scattering of the man's household.

o 4949

BE MUNUS TU₁₅ i-ri-ma TU₁₅ MIN<(U₃.TU)> ḪUL GAL₂-ma AMA UGU DUMU.MUNUS-šu₂ KA₂-šu₂ TAB ŠEŠti NU GAL₂ KUR BI ZAḪ₂ BURU₁₄ KUR NU SI.[SA₂]

(o 49) If a woman becomes pregnant with air and ditto (gives birth to) air: there will be evil and the mother will shut her(masc.) door to her(masc.) daughter; there will be no ...; that land will be destroyed; the land's harvest will not thrive.

o 5050

BE MUNUS AD₆ MIN<(U₃.TU)> DINGIR GU₇ LUGAL ina x [...] BA.UŠ₂

(o 50) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a corpse: the god will devour (the land); the king will die in ....

o 5151

BE MUNUS lu₂LIL MIN<(U₃.TU)> tam-ṭa-a-tu BIR [...] MANni

(o 51) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a he-idiot: losses; scattering of [...] will change.

o 5252

BE MUNUS munusLIL MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ NA ana IZItu₂ [...] GARan

(o 52) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a she-idiot: the man's house will [...] into fire [...] will take place.

o 5353

BE MUNUS lu₂BA.AN.ZA MIN<(U₃.TU)> tam-ṭa-a-ti [...] E₂ LU₂ BIR

(o 53) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a lame-boy: losses [...]; the man's household will be scattered.

o 5454

BE MUNUS munusBA.AN.ZA MIN<(U₃.TU)> ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(tam-ṭa-a-ti)> [...] E₂ LU₂ BIR

(o 54) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a lame-girl: ditto (losses [...]; the man's household will be scattered).

o 5555

BE MUNUS a-ka-a-am MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ LU₂ ⸢ul⸣-ta-aš-ša₂-⸢aš⸣

(o 55) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a he-weakling: the man's household will suffer.

o 5656

BE MUNUS a-ku-tam MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ LU₂ BIR [...] KI.MIN<(⸢ul⸣-ta-aš-ša₂-⸢aš⸣)>

(o 56) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a she-weakling: the man's household will be scattered [...] ditto (the man's household will suffer).

o 5757

BE MUNUS bi-ni-it NITA MIN<(U₃.TU)> INIM <<gu>> SIG₅ ana KUR i-sa-an-ni-iq

(o 57) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) the shape of a male: favourable news will approach the land.

o 5858

BE MUNUS bi-ni-it MUNUS MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ BI!(GU₄) ana IGI-[šu₂ DU]ak NI₃.SIG₅ GAR-šu₂

(o 58) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) the shape of a female: that household will grow larger; good fortune will be provided for him.

o 5959

BE MUNUS IGI.NU.TUKU MIN<(U₃.TU)> KUR id-dal-⸢laḫ E₂⸣ LU₂ NU SI.SA₂

(o 59) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a blind one: the land will be disturbed; the man's household will not thrive.

o 6060

BE MUNUS KI.TAat ŠA₃-BI MIN<(U₃.TU)> IRI BI ḪUL ⸢IGI⸣mar NIG₂.ḪA.LA.AM.MA IGI

(o 60) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) the lower parts of her womb:3 that city will experience evil; it will experience annihilation.

o 6161

BE MUNUS ku-ub-bu-lu₄ MIN<(U₃.TU)> KUR id-⸢dal⸣-[laḫ] E₂ LU₂ NU BIRaḫ

(o 61) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a kubbulu-cripple: the land will be disturbed; the man's household will not be scattered.

o 6262

BE MUNUS GEŠTU₂.LA₂ ⸢MIN⸣<(U₃.TU)> [...] U₄ ana IGI-šu₂ DUak

(o 62) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a deaf one: [...] ... will grow larger.

o 6363

BE MUNUS šu-la-nam [MIN<(U₃.TU)> ... uḫ]-⸢ta⸣-ši-iḫ IRI BI ŠUBdi

(o 63) If a woman [ditto (gives birth to)] a wart-covered one: [...] is brought to want; that house will be abandoned.

o 6464

BE MUNUS ḫu-šu-lam [MIN<(U₃.TU)> ...] NU ŠE.ŠE.GA-ME

(o 64) If a woman [ditto (gives birth to)] a bruised one: [...] they will not agree with one another.

o 6565

[BE] MUNUS ḫu-ub-bu-ša₂ MIN<(U₃.TU)> EN E₂ [...] TI ina-aš-ši

(o 65) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a swollen one: the house's owner will carry [...].

o 6666

[BE] MUNUS KU₅.KU₅.DA MIN<(U₃.TU)> DAM [...] UŠ₂

(o 66) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a hummuru-cripple: the wife of [...] will die.

o 6767

[BE] MUNUS ⸢A⸣.[RI].⸢A⸣ dŠUL.PA.E₃.⸢A⸣ MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ BI [...] dIŠKUR RAiṣ

(o 67) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) the spawn of Šulpae: that house - [...] Adad will devastate (it).

o 6868

[BE] ⸢MUNUS A₂⸣.KAM lu ⸢NITA⸣ [lu] ⸢MUNUS⸣ MIN<(U₃.TU)> MUNUS BI ina SILA ša₂ ar₂-[nam ...] ir-ḫi-⸢ši⸣

(o 68) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a šēhānu-ecstatic, either male or female: that woman - the one who [...] sin had sexual intercourse with her in the street.

o 6969

[BE MUNUS] mu-us-[su]-⸢ku⸣ MIN<(U₃.TU)> LUGAL ŠU₂ ina ⸢KUR GAL₂⸣

(o 69) If a woman ditto (gives birth to) a wretched one: there will be a king of the world in the land.

o 7070

[BE MUNUS ...] U₄ MIN<(U₃.TU)> LUGAL ⸢ŠU₂?⸣ IR [...]

(o 70) [If a woman] ditto (gives birth to) [...] ...: a king of the world ... [...].

o 7171

[BE MUNUS ... ṣu-un]-⸢du⸣-ru MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ [...] IGI [...]

(o 71) [If a woman] ditto (gives birth to) a cross-eyed one: the house [...].

o 7272

[BE MUNUS ...] MA MIN<(U₃.TU)> E₂ [...]

(o 72) [If a woman] ditto (gives birth to) [...] ...: the house [...].

(rest of obverse missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[...] x x [...]

(r 1') [...] ... [...].

r 2'2'

[...] ⸢GUR⸣ ZIbu dan-nu x [...]

(r 2') [...] ... massive attack ... [...].

r 3'3'

[...]-MEŠ U₃.TU dan-na-tu₄ ⸢ina KUR GAL₂⸣ [...]

(r 3') [...] gives birth to [...]: there will be distress in the land ... [...].

r 4'4'

BE ⸢MUNUS⸣ 2 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma ŠA₃-šu₂-nu 1-ma DAM u [...]

(r 4') If a woman gives birth to 2 boys and their heart is one: husband and [...].

r 5'5'

BE MUNUS 2 NITA-MEŠ še-pa-nu-šu-nu U₃.TU ⸢E₂? BI⸣ [...]

(r 5') If a woman gives birth to 2 boys, whose feet are as one: that house [...].

r 6'6'

BE MUNUS 2 U₃.TU-ma 1 NITA 1 MUNUS la₃ ŠE.ŠE.GA ina KUR GAL₂-ma ⸢E₂⸣ [...]

(r 6') If a woman gives birth to 2 (children) and they are 1 boy, 1 girl: there will be discord in the land and the house [...].

r 7'7'

BE MUNUS 2 U₃.TU-⸢ma⸣ GIM GU₄.TUR dUTU DAB.DABtu LUGAL a-a-bi-šu₂ ŠU-su [...]

(r 7') If a woman gives birth to 2 (children) and they are interlocked like the bull-men of Šamaš: (as for) the king - his hand [...] his enemies.

r 8'8'

BE MUNUS 2 U₃.TU-ma ina GU₂.MURGU-šu₂-nu in-nen-du-ma pa-nu-šu₂-nu a-ḫe-⸢e⸣ GAR [...]  ; KUR DINGIR-MEŠ-[šu₂] TAG₄-ME-šu₂ ⸢LUGAL⸣ DUMU-MEŠ-⸢šu₂⸣ [...]

(r 8') If a woman gives birth to 2 (children) and they are joined by their backbone, but their faces are located separately [...]: (as for) the land - its gods will leave it; (as for the king) - his sons will [...].

r 9'9'

BE MUNUS 2 U₃.TU-ma ap-pi u GIR₃ la₃ TUKU-ME ⸢KUR⸣ LUGAL kar-⸢mu⸣-tu₂ ⸢DU⸣[ak]

(r 9') If a woman gives birth to 2 (children) and they have neither nose nor foot: the king's land will go to ruin.

r 10'10'

BE MUNUS MAŠ.TAB.BA uš-⸢ta⸣-[aš]-ni-ma U₃.TU ⸢KUR⸣ BI ZAḪ₂ E₂ LU₂ BIRaḫ

(r 10') If a woman gives birth to twins for the second time: that land will be destroyed; the man's household will be scattered.

r 11'11'

BE MUNUS MAŠ.TAB.BA U₃.TU-⸢ma⸣ [...] DAB.DAB-ma [...] ša₂ 1-en i-be-lu-ši

(r 11') If a woman gives birth to twins and [...] they are interlocked and [...] which one (had) ruled.

r 12'12'

BE MUNUS MAŠ.TAB.BA U₃.TU-ma [...] GAL₂ KUR₂ ina gišTUKUL GAZ-an-ni-ma

(r 12') If a woman gives birth to twins and [...] there will be [...]; the enemy will defeat me in battle and will reduce the land; helplessness; ... [...] will kill in [...] the land.

r 13'13'

KUR TUR u₂-la-lu-tu₂ x [...] ina? [...] KUR? i-dak

r 14'14'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(MAŠ.TAB.BA)> U₃.TU-ma ina TI-šu₂-nu DAB.[DAB] [...] x-MEŠ NU [x] ⸢giš⸣TUKUL KUR₂ GAZ-šu₂-ma GABA.RI

(r 14') If a woman ditto (gives birth to twins) and they are interlocked at their ribcage [...] ... you will defeat the enemy in battle and the correspondence (with the previous apodosis).

r 15'15'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(MAŠ.TAB.BA)> U₃.TU-ma ina TI-šu₂-nu DAB.[DAB-ma] 15? ŠU-šu₂-nu la₃ GAL₂ ⸢ZI⸣bu BURU₁₄ KUR KUR₂ GU₇

(r 15') If a woman ditto (gives birth to twins) and they are interlocked at their ribcage [and] their right hands do not exist: attack; the enemy will eat the land's harvest.

r 16'16'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(MAŠ.TAB.BA)> U₃.TU-ma ina TI-šu₂-nu DAB.DAB-ma ša₂ 2.30 ŠU-šu₂-nu la₃ GAL₂ NUN UGU EN DU₁₁-šu₂ GUBaz

(r 16') If a woman ditto (gives birth to twins) and they are interlocked at their ribcage and their left hands do not exist: the prince will triumph over his enemy.

r 17'17'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(MAŠ.TAB.BA)> U₃.TU-ma ina TI-šu₂-nu DAB.DAB-ma ša₂ 15 GIR₃-šu₂ ša₂ 15 la₃ GAL₂ ⸢ṭu₂⸣-[da]-at KUR-ia₅ KUR₂ TAG₄-ma KUR kar-mu-tu₂ u₂-šal-lak

(r 17') If a woman ditto (gives birth to twins) and they are interlocked at their ribcage and (for) the one on the right his right foot does not exist: the enemy will leave the paths of my land but will provoke ruination (over) the land.

r 18'18'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(MAŠ.TAB.BA)> U₃.TU-ma ina TI-šu₂-nu DAB.DAB-ma ša₂ 2.30 GIR₃-šu₂ ša₂ 2.30 la₃ GAL₂ ⸢ṭu₂⸣-[da]-at KUR KUR₂ TAG₄-ma KUR KUR₂ kar-mu-tu₂ u₂-šal-lak

(r 18') If a woman ditto (gives birth to twins) and they are interlocked at their ribcage and (for) the one on the left his left foot does not exist: he will leave the paths of the enemy's land but will provoke ruination (over) the enemy's land.

r 19'19'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(MAŠ.TAB.BA)> U₃.TU-ma ina TI-šu₂-nu DAB.DAB-ma ša₂ 15 GIR₃-šu₂ la₃ GAL₂-MEŠ KUR KI.⸢TUŠ-sa₃ ŠUB⸣-ma kar-mu-tu₂ DUak

(r 19') If a woman ditto (gives birth to twins) and they are interlocked at their ribcage and (for) the one on the right his feet do not exist: the land - its habitations will be abandoned and it will go to ruin.

r 20'20'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(MAŠ.TAB.BA)> U₃.TU-ma ina TI-šu₂-nu DAB.DAB-ma ša₂ 2.30 GIR₃-šu₂ la₃ GAL₂-MEŠ KI.TUŠ-sa₃ ŠUB-ma GABA.RI

(r 20') If a woman ditto (gives birth to twins) and they are interlocked at their ribcage and (for) the one on the left his feet do not exist: its habitations will be abandoned and the the correspondence (with the previous apodosis).

r 21'21'

BE MUNUS 2 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU E₂ BI ana IGI-šu₂ DUak

(r 21') If a woman gives birth to 2 girls: that household will grow larger.

r 22'22'

BE MUNUS 2 MUNUS-MEŠ šu-ta-ḫa-tu₂ U₃.TU KUR NUN DAGAL ⸢LUGAL⸣ [a]-a-bi-šu₂ ŠU-su KURad₂

(r 22') If a woman gives birth to 3 identical girls: the prince's land will expand; the king (lit. his hand) will conquer his enemies.

r 23'23'

BE MUNUS 3 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma ŠA₃-ši-na 1-ma DAM u ⸢DAM in⸣-da-gar-u₂-ma E₂ LU₂ DAGAL

(r 23') If a woman gives birth to 3 girls and their belly is 1: husband and wife will agree with one another and the man's household will increase.

r 24'24'

BE MUNUS 3 MUNUS-MEŠ še-pa-na-ši-na U₃.TU ⸢EN⸣ E₂ BI UŠ₂

(r 24') If a woman gives birth to 3 girls whose feet are as one: the owner of that house will die.

r 25'25'

BE MUNUS 3 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU KUR KISLAḪ₃ DAB-ma ŠA₃.ḪUL IGI EN E₂ UŠ₂

(r 25') If a woman gives birth to 3 boys: the land will be afflicted by distress and it will experience sorrow; the house's owner will die.

r 26'26'

BE MUNUS 3 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma TI-ME KUR BI ŠUB-ma ŠA₃.⸢ḪUL⸣ IGI

(r 26') If a woman gives birth to 3 boys and they are healthy: that land will be abandoned and it will experience sorrow.

r 27'27'

BE MUNUS 3 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma UŠ₂-ME KUR BI DAGALiš

(r 27') If a woman gives birth to 3 boys and they are dead: that land will expand.

r 28'28'

BE MUNUS 3 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma ŠA₃-šu₂-nu 1-ma KUR BI ŠUBdi

(r 28') If a woman gives birth to 3 boys and their belly is 1: that land will be abandoned.

r 29'29'

BE MUNUS 3 U₃.TU-ma 2 NITA-MEŠ 1 MUNUS SUḪ₃ UGU KUR ŠUB-ma KUR NU ŠE.ŠE.⸢GA⸣ U₂.GUG GAL₂-ma  ; UN-MEŠ DUMU-MEŠ-ši-na ana [x] ⸢BUR₂⸣-MEŠ

(r 29') If a woman gives birth to 3 (children) and they are 2 boys, 1 girl: chaos will fall over the land and the land will be discordant; there will be famine and the people will dispose of their children for [...].

r 30'30'

BE MUNUS 3 U₃.TU 2 MUNUS-MEŠ 1 NITA DINGIR SUḪ₃ UGU KUR KUR₂ ŠUB!-ma KUR LUGAL ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.⸢GA SUḪUŠ E₂⸣ LU₂ GI.NA

(r 30') If a woman gives birth to 3 (children) and they are 2 girls, 1 boy: the god will make chaos fall over the enemy's land; the king's land will become satisfied; the foundations of the man's house will become permanent.

r 31'31'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(3)> U₃.TU-ma bu-un-na-ni-šu₂-nu la₃ GAL₂-MEŠ KUR SU.GU₇ DAB-ma in-neš-ši

(r 31') If a woman ditto (gives birth to 3 children) and their features do not exist: famine will afflict the land and (the land) will become confused.

r 32'32'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(3)> U₃.TU-ma SAG.DU-ME-šu-nu la₃ GAL₂-MEŠ LUGAL-MEŠ KUR₂-MEŠ ZI!-ME-nim-ma NU ŠE.ŠE.GA

(r 32') If a woman ditto (gives birth to 3 children) and their heads do not exist: the enemy kings will attack but they will not agree with one another.

r 33'33'

BE MUNUS KI.MIN<(3)> U₃.TU-ma i-lik-šu₂-nu 1-ma KUR₂ ZI-ma KUR un-na-aš

(r 33') If a woman ditto (gives birth to 3 children) and their hip is one: the enemy will attack and he will weaken the land.

r 34'34'

BE MUNUS tak-ši-i U₃.TU EN E₂ BA.UŠ₂

(r 34') If a woman gives birth to triplets: the house's owner will die.

r 35'35'

BE MUNUS 3 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU KUR BI DAGALiš LUGAL a-a-bi-šu₂ ŠU-su KURad₂

(r 35') If a woman gives birth to 3 girls: that land will expand; the king (lit. his hand) will conquer his enemies.

r 36'36'

BE MUNUS 3 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma ŠA₃-ši-na 1-ma KUR DAG ne-eḫ-tu₂ TUŠab

(r 36') If a woman gives birth to 3 girls and their belly is one: the land will live in a peaceful dwelling.

r 37'37'

BE MUNUS 4 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU NIG₂.ḪA.LAM.MA ina KUR KUR₂!(GAL) GARan

(r 37') If a woman gives birth to 4 boys: annihilation will take place in the enemy's land.

r 38'38'

BE MUNUS 4 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma TI-ME KUR₂ IRI NIGIN-ma DABbat SIG GAZak

(r 38') If a woman gives birth to 4 boys and they are healthy: the enemy will beseige the city and seize (it); a notable will be killed.

r 39'39'

BE MUNUS 4 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma UŠ₂-ME KUR₂ IRI NIGIN-ma NU DAB IDIM KUR₂ GAZak

(r 39') If a woman gives birth to 4 boys and they are dead: the enemy will beseige the city but will not seize (it); an enemy nobleman will be killed.

r 40'40'

BE MUNUS 4 U₃.TU-ma 2 NITA-MEŠ 2 MUNUS-MEŠ GU₃ KUR₂ dan-nu KUR NIGIN E₂ LU₂ BIRaḫ

(r 40') If a woman gives birth to 4 (children) and they are 2 boys, 2 girls: the enemy's strong clamour will surround the land; the man's household will be scattered.

r 41'41'

BE MUNUS lu 2 lu 3 lu 4 U₃.TU KUR ḪULpat

(r 41') If a woman gives birth to either 2 or 3 or 4 (children): the land will be plundered.

r 42'42'

BE MUNUS 4 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma TI-ME KUR KISLAḪ₃ IGImar

(r 42') If a woman gives birth to 4 girls and they are healthy: the land will experience distress.

r 43'43'

BE MUNUS 4 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU-ma UŠ₂-ME KUR SIG₅ IGImar

(r 43') If a woman gives birth to 4 girls and they are dead: the land will experience good fortune.

r 44'44'

BE MUNUS 4 u₃ lu 5 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU <<1>> KUR BIR BAL MANni

(r 44') If a woman gives birth to 4 or 5 boys: the land will be scattered; the reign will change.

r 45'45'

BE MUNUS 4 u₃ lu 5 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU <<2>> KUR BI DAGAL E₂ LU₂ DAGAL

(r 45') If a woman gives birth to 4 or 5 girls: that land will expand; the man's household will increase.

r 46'46'

BE MUNUS 5 U₃.TU-ma 3 NITA-MEŠ 2 MUNUS-MEŠ KUR BI BIR LUGAL-ša₂ ZAḪ₂ KI.MIN EN E₂ UŠ₂

(r 46') If a woman gives birth to 5 (children) and they are 2 boys, 2 girls: that land will be scattered; its king will disappear; ditto; the house's owner will die.

r 47'47'

BE MUNUS 5 U₃.TU-ma 3 MUNUS-MEŠ 2 NITA-MEŠ KUR BI ZAḪ₂

(r 47') If a woman gives birth to 5 (children) and they are 3 girls, 2 boys: that land will be destroyed.

r 48'48'

BE MUNUS 5 u₂-lu 6 NITA-MEŠ U₃.TU KUR BI BIR BAL MANni

(r 48') If a woman gives birth to 5 or 6 boys: that land will be scattered; the reign will change.

r 49'49'

BE MUNUS 5 u₂-lu 6 MUNUS-MEŠ U₃.TU KUR BI DAGAL E₂ LU₂ DAGAL

(r 49') If a woman gives birth to 5 or 6 girls: that land will expand; the man's household will increase.

r 50'50'

BE MUNUS 6 U₃.TU KUR BI DAGAL LUGAL a-a-bi-šu₂ ŠU-su KURad₂

(r 50') If a woman gives birth to 6 (children): that land will expand; the king (lit. his hand) will conquer his enemies.

r 51'51'

BE MUNUS 7 U₃.TU ZIut LUGAL IM.GI UMUŠ KUR MANni UN-MEŠ DUMU-MEŠ-ši-na <ana> KU₃.BABBAR BUR₂-MEŠ

(r 51') If a woman gives birth to 7 (children): rise of rebel king; decisions for the land will change; people will dispose of their sons for silver.

r 52'52'

BE MUNUS 7 u₂-lu 8 U₃.TU LUGAL IM.GI ZI-ME-nim-ma KUR i-ḫar-ru-ub

(r 52') If a woman gives birth to 7 or 8 (children): rebel kings will arise and the land will become deserted.

(catchline)
r 53'53'

BE MUNUS U₃.TU-ma SAG.DU UR.MAḪ GAR LUGAL dan-nu <ina> KUR GAL₂ši

(r 53') If a woman gives birth and (the baby) is provided with a lion's head: there will be a mighty king in the land.

(colophon)
r 54'54'

ŠU.NIGIN 1 UŠ 59-AM₃ MU ŠID-BI DUB 1-KAM.MA BE iz-bu EŠ₂.GAR₃ BE MUNUS PEŠ₄-ma ša₃ ŠA₃-ša₃ ER₂

(r 54') Total 1 sixty 59 lines, counted; tablet 1 (of the series): "If an anomaly" (from) the Series: "If a woman is pregnant and her foetus cries".

r 55'55'

la₃ AL.TIL GABA.RI UNUGki GIM SUMUN-šu₂ SAR-ma ba-ri DUB mda-nu—ik-ṣur

(r 55') Not completed. Copy of Uruk, written and checked according to its original. Tablet of Anu-ikṣur, son of Šamaš-iddin, descendant of Šangi-Ninurta, junior incantation priest. Hand of Anu-mušallim, his son.

r 56'56'

⸢DUMU⸣ ša₂ mdUTU—MU DUMU lu₂SANGA—dMAŠ lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ BAN₃.DA qa-at₂ mda-nu—GI DUMU-šu₂

r 57'57'

MUD AN.ŠAR₂ u dKI.ŠAR₂ la₃ TUM₃

(r 57') He who reveres Anšar and Kišar shall not take (the tablet) away.

1 The expression DINGIR GU₇ means "epidemic , plague ": it is cited as the equivalent of mūtānu in Izbu commentaries : 22.

2 There are several instances of confused gender in this text.

3 The woman probably suffers a prolapsed womb.

Created by Marie-Françoise Besnier for the AHRC-funded GKAB Project, 2009 and released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/cams/gkab/P348694
